_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, and stakeholder communication across business units.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.392), LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.392).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.468). Shared vocabulary: [lead]. DCWF-only terms [develop, exercises] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.868, R=0.834). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Develop and lead exercises" and "Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.402 < STS 0.468 (gap -0.066). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [develop, exercises] and [access, across, alignment] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [lead]. DCWF-only: [develop, exercises]. WIDAI-only: [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication].
